title: Lock more, mint more
introduction: You have {{available}} ICP available that isn't minting rewards. Lock 100% of your ICP in neurons to maximize your governance rewards.
introductionMaturityOnly: You have {{available}} unstaked maturity that isn't compounding. Stake your maturity and enable auto-stake on your neurons to maximize your rewards.

whyStake.title: Why lock everything?
whyStake.rewards: Unlocked ICP mints 0%, while locked ICP mints up to {{maxApy}} maturity.
whyStake.votingPower: More locked ICP equals more influence in governance decisions.
whyStake.flexibility: You can dissolve neurons anytime (withdrawable after the locking period).

whyStakeMaturity.title: Why enable auto-stake maturity?
whyStakeMaturity.rewards: Unstaked maturity mints 0%, while staked maturity compounds and mints up to {{maxApy}} maturity.
whyStakeMaturity.votingPower: Staked maturity increases your neuron's voting power.
whyStakeMaturity.compounding: Auto-staked maturity compounds automatically, boosting long-term rewards.

recommendation: Lock your available {{available}} ICP with an 8-year delay to maximize your rewards.
recommendationMaturityOnly: Stake your maturity and enable auto-stake maturity on your neurons.
